div.head: NSC0038 - February 01, 1990 - Arms Control Issues, Moscow MinisterialSource: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSC Meetings Files, OA/ID 90001-035, NSC0038-February 01, 1990-Arms Control Issues, Moscow Ministerial. Secret. The meeting took place in the Oval Office.
div.p: "SEGRE? RECORD 1D: 9020314 , NSC/S PROFILE RECEIVED: 09 MAR 90 10 TO: MEMO FOR RECORD FROM: SCOWCROFT DOC DATE: 09 MAR 90 SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: START CFE USSR ARMS CONTROL MINUTES NSC PERSONS: | SUBJECT: MINUTES OF 1 FEB NSC MTG RE START ISSUES ON 1 FEB ACTION: FOR RECORD PURPOSES DUE DATE: 13 MAR 90 STATUS: C STAFF OFFICERs:NONE F LOGREF: 9020107 9020142 | FILES (ze. ) SCP: NS0038 CODES: | hen st a. DOC NT DISTRIBUTION FOR ACTION FOR CONCURRENCE FOR _ INFO White House Guidelines E.0. 12958, SEC 3.4 (B) September 11, 2006 By caP__ NARA, Date 4/23/04 COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DATE BY HAND W/ATTCH OPENED BY: NSAJC CLOSED BY: NSAJC Doc 10F 1

ij .; "SECRET RecorD 1D NSC/S PROFILE RECEIVED: 29 JAN 90 11 TO: HUGHES | FROM: GORDON DOC DATE: 29 JAN 90 | DAVIS SOURCE REF: | KANTER | KEYWORDS: ARMS CONTROL USSR NSC AGENDA PERSONS: SUBJECT: NSC MIG 1 FEB TO REVIEW THE STATUS FO ARMS CONTROL ISSUES PRIOR TO UPCOMING MINITERIAL IN MOSCOW ACTION: NOTED BY HUGHES DUE DATE: 01 FEB 90 STATUS: C STAFF OFFIGER:, GORDON; LOGREF: 9020107 9020314 FILES AP, SCP: Sin/ CODES: \ DOCUMENT DISTRIBUTION FOR ACTION FOR _CONCURRENCE FOR INFO White House Guidelines E.0. 12958, SEC 3.4 (B) September 11, 2006 By car__ NARA, Date s/asloy COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DATE BY HAND W/ATTCH OPENED BY: NSCDM CLOSED BY: NSAMM Doc 10F 4 -SRERE

ez 3 UNCLASSIFIED RECORD ID#/9020107. NSC/S PROFILE RECEIVED: 23 JAN 90 10 TO: SCOWCROFT FROM: HAGIN, J DOC DATE: 22 JAN 90 SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: NSC PERSONS: SUBJECT: APPROVED PRES ACTIVITY RE NSC MTG 1 FEB ~ ACTION: FOR RECORD PURPOSES DUE DATE: 24 APR 90 STATUS: C STAFF OFF ONE LOGREF: 9020142 9020314 F an SCP soos 2 CODES: DOCUMENT DISTRIBUTION | FOR ACTION FOR_CONCURRENCE FOR_INFO COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DATE BY HAND W/ATTCH OPENED BY: CH CLOSED BY: CM poe 10F 1 UNCLASSIFIED |

THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON MEMORANDUM TO: Brent Scowcroft FROM: JOSEPH W. HAGIN SUBJECT: APPROVED PRESIDENTIAL ACTIVITY aa NSC Meeting DATE: February 1, 1990 ----- Thursday TIME: 2330 > p-m-; DURATION: 90 minutes LOCATION: Cabinet Room ATTIRE: Business suit REMARKS REQUIRED: NO MEDIA COVERAGE: White House Photographeronly FIRST LADY we PARTICIPATION: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION: CONTACT: TELEPHONE: OFFICE HOME NOTE: PROJECT OFFICER, SEE ATTACHED CHECKLIST Ed Rogers Marlin Fitzwater David Bates James Cicconi David Demarest David Valdez Fred McClure Jean Lamb USSS - PPD Susan Porter Rose SigRogich - Gary Walters Patty Presock John Keller WHCA Audio/Visual Chriss Winston Tim McBride WHCA Operations Laurie Firestone J. Bonnie Newman C. Boyden Gray William Kristol Paul Bateman John Herrick Jackie Kennedy LRF 1/22/90
